title: helianthemum violaceum var. strictum
intro: Helianthemum violaceum var. strictum, also known as the 'rock rose', is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, skin conditions, and inflammation due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The rock rose plant has been found to have health benefits such as promoting wound healing, reducing pain and inflammation, and exhibiting antimicrobial activity against certain bacteria and fungi. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum violaceum var. strictum include infusions, tinctures, and salves, often used topically to treat skin conditions and wounds.
